'''''Classic Adventures: Volume Five''''' is an anthology of three previously published ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' adventures. It was released by [[West End Games]] in [[1998]].

==Contents==
*[[Starfall (adventure)|''Starfall'']]
*''[[Strike Force: Shantipole]]''
*''[[The Game Chambers of Questal]]''
